lines: <description>VLAN IF for oRan eCPRI CU plane</description>
evidences.text:
<rpc xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:netconf:base:1.0" message-id="95">
  <edit-config xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:netconf:base:1.0">
    <target>
      <running/>
    </target>
    <config>
      <interfaces xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:yang:ietf-interfaces">
        <interface>
          <name>vlan_1_ethernetInterface0</name>
          <description>VLAN IF for oRan eCPRI CU plane</description>
          <type xmlns:ianaift="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:yang:iana-if-type">ianaift:l2vlan</type>
          <enabled>true</enabled>
          <base-interface xmlns="urn:o-ran:interfaces:1.0">ethernetInterface0</base-interface>
          <vlan-id xmlns="urn:o-ran:interfaces:1.0">1</vlan-id>
          <mac-address xmlns="urn:o-ran:interfaces:1.0">d0:48:4f:2b:1f:3f</mac-address>
        </interface>
      </interfaces>
    </config>
  </edit-config>
</rpc>
